name: Sales (sales_data)
description: Data export by region and date range; 1 million rows in the source table
sql:
SELECT 
   id, region, 
category, 
product, 
manager, 
channel, 
sale_date, 
revenue, 
units, 
sale_year, 
sale_quarter, 
sale_month_name, 
sale_day_num, 
sale_weekday_name,
sale_hour 
FROM sales_data 
WHERE (%(region)s IS NULL OR region = %(region)s) 
AND (%(date_from)s::timestamp IS NULL OR sale_date >= %(date_from)s::timestamp) AND (%(date_to)s::timestamp IS NULL OR sale_date < %(date_to)s::timestamp + interval '1 day') 
AND (%(products)s::text[] IS NULL OR product = ANY(%(products)s::text[])) 
ORDER BY sale_date
columns_query:
SELECT 
id, region, 
category, 
product, 
manager, 
channel, 
sale_date, 
revenue, 
units, 
sale_year, 
sale_quarter, 
sale_month_name, 
sale_day_num, 
sale_weekday_name,
sale_hour  
FROM sales_data limit 0

params.name: products
params.list_query: SELECT DISTINCT product FROM sales_data ORDER BY product
